column1: C[Tom Newman: Hi walter.  So what kind of problems were you having getting to the other game?
C[Tom Newman: Hi walter.  So what kind of problems were you having getting to the other game?
C[stickdice: It would not compleatly load, ever.
C[Tom Newman: Are you using Chrome now?
stickdice: Yes, and it is working as it should.
C[Tom Newman: I think you will like chrome.  Much better than IE. If you sign up for a Google account it has lots of features for your bookmarks and passwords.
Tom Newman: Walter - you may be interested in this site to help you learn http://playgo.to/iwtg/en/
